# Copilot Instructions

Repository documentation — use these as the source of truth:

- [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) — project context, requirements, decisions, implementation guidance
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) — design decisions, trade-offs, security controls, known limitations
- [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md) — pre-submission gaps and production vision

Claude reads from and writes documentation to all three files. CLAUDE.md is the primary AI prompt; ARCHITECTURE.md is where design rationale lives; ROADMAP.md tracks what is actionable vs. theoretical.
